stages.name: First Hires
stages.description: Find market fit, hire well, don't run out of money

stages.name: Scaled
stages.tagline: Stay true & go to the next level

revenueStages.label: Pre-revenue
revenueStages.description: No paying customers yet. Focus is on building and validation.

revenueStages.label: Early customers
revenueStages.description: First paying customers. Revenue exists but is not yet repeatable.

revenueStages.label: Scaling, low complexity
revenueStages.description: Growing recurring revenue, mostly homogeneous customer base (e.g. SMB SaaS).

revenueStages.label: Enterprise or mixed
revenueStages.description: Enterprise or mixed customer base. Complex contracts, compliance requirements, longer sales cycles.

revenueStages.label: Multi-model / complex
revenueStages.description: Multiple revenue models (e.g. SaaS + services + marketplace). High operational complexity.

fundingStages.label: Bootstrapped
fundingStages.description: Self-funded. No external investors. Cash management is existential.

fundingStages.label: Angel / friends & family
fundingStages.description: Early informal investors. Light reporting obligations, no formal board.

fundingStages.label: Venture-backed (seed/early)
fundingStages.description: Institutional investors. Board formed. Investor reporting and board packs required.

fundingStages.label: Venture-backed (growth/PE)
fundingStages.description: Growth or PE capital. Formal governance, structured board, compliance obligations increase.

fundingStages.label: Public company
fundingStages.description: Listed company. Full regulatory compliance, IR function, audit committee required.
